versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   openebs-4-5-0                   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: openebs
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: openebs-4-5-0
      name: openebs
      namespace: openebs
      values: |
        openebs:
          engines:
            local:
              lvm:
                enabled: false
              zfs:
                enabled: false
            replicated:
              mayastor:
                enabled: false
          loki:
            enabled: false
          alloy:
            enabled: false
    
          localpv-provisioner:
            hostpathClass:
              enabled: true
              isDefaultClass: true
